parts.text:
"Benchmark task: feature-add-small
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Add title-case support to bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs using the existing mode-based pattern. Read bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs and bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs first. Do not add dependencies. Verify with node --test bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
Let me start by reading the two files mentioned to understand the current implementation and test structure before making any changes.

metadata.preview:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

display.text:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

state.title: bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs

parts.text:
Now I understand the task:
1. The current `formatTitle.mjs` has three modes: 'upper', 'lower', and 'plain' (default)
2. The test expects a 'title' mode that should convert 'hello benchmark world' to 'Hello Benchmark World'

I need to add title-case support. Looking at the existing pattern, I should add a condition for mode === 'title' that converts the string to title case.

Title case typically means:
- First letter of each word is uppercase
- Rest of letters are lowercase

I'll add a title case function. Let me create the smallest code change that adds this functionality.
